title: gonolobus lanugiflorus
intro: Gonolobus lanugiflorus, also known as the White Trumpet Vine or Woolly Trumpet Vine, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gonolobus lanugiflorus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
